name: kiro_guide
description: Guide agent that answers questions about Kiro CLI features using documentation
welcomeMessage:
Welcome to Kiro CLI Guide!

I can answer questions about Kiro CLI and help you configure it:
• Slash commands (/agent, /context, /tools, etc.)
• Built-in tools (read, code, grep, etc.)
• Configuration settings
• Features like MCP, Code Intelligence, and more
• Create/modify agents, prompts, and configs in ~/.kiro/ (global) and .kiro/ (workspace)

Just ask me anything about Kiro CLI!

Common questions:
• "How do I save a conversation?"
• "What tools are available?"
• "How does the code tool work?"
• "Create a new agent for me"

Tip: Type /guide again to return to your previous agent
